## What's Changed

**Improvements**
- Improved something, with better something.

**Known Issues**
- We know about something

**Bugfixes**
- Fixed an issue

## Image Details

### RetroPie

This RetroPie image will build/install RetroPie from https://github.com/RetroPie/RetroPie-Setup

The image should be flashed with Raspberry Pi Imager with WiFi customisations completed. Upon connecting to your network, RetroPie will install. This will take a LONG time (Upwards of an hour) make sure your PSPi is charging.

[How to SSH with RetroPie](https://retropie.org.uk/docs/SSH/)

These images support customisations via Raspberry Pi Imager

Username: `pi`  
Password: `raspberry`


### Lakka

[Accessing Lakka command line interface](https://www.lakka.tv/doc/Accessing-Lakka-command-line-interface/)

This image does not support customisations via Raspberry Pi Imager

Username: `root`  
Password: `root`


### Raspberry Pi OS

[Introduction to remote access](https://www.raspberrypi.com/documentation/computers/remote-access.html)

These images support customisations via Raspberry Pi Imager

Username: `pi`  
Password: `raspberry`

### Kali

[Kali SSH Configuration](https://www.kali.org/docs/general-use/ssh-configuration/)

This image does not support customisations via Raspberry Pi Imager

Username: `kali`  
Password: `kali`
